reddit_sideproject.title: I built AI LinkedIn headshots for $9.9/mo flat (PhotoAI charges $29+)
reddit_sideproject.body:
Upload a selfie → 4 professional styles in ~30 seconds. 5 free generations.

I got tired of PhotoAI pricing so I shipped a simpler indie alternative.

https://ai-headshots-navy.vercel.app/join?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=sideproject

Happy to hear brutal feedback.

reddit_linkedin.title: Cheap AI headshots for LinkedIn — $9.9/mo unlimited

hn.title: Show HN: AI headshots in 30s – $9.9/mo flat

twitter.text: Shipped: AI LinkedIn headshots in 30 seconds — $9.9/mo flat (vs PhotoAI $29+). 5 free tries 👇
